Joyride Dogs: FINAL DAYS! Get 10% OFF + a $15 Seatbelt (FREE).

Use Code: DOGS

joyrideharness.attn.tv/a7NdHgIdGGTk

Joyride Dogs: Free Shipping FLASH SALE-

Get free shipping, no minimums:

Use code: HORSE

joyrideharness.attn.tv/a_XO6hFZZYlg

Ends midnight tonight!
Can I text the costumer service over here as well?
Joyride Dogs: We don't offer phone support right now but I'd be happy to help you over text, let me know what I can do for you.
I have a question about the leash I purchased from you.

The dog leash hook seems so extrem easy to open. There for I am feeling worried using it that it could open if my dog pulls hard. The other leashes I have it's strong clipped not to easy to open. I bought your leash because of the car seat buckle. But now I am worried that it could open if pulling and wiggle.

When I say strong clipped I am mean not hard for me to open. But your is so easy to open my toddler could easily open it. It's not strong together or however you would call it.  I hope you understand what I try to explain.

Joyride Dogs: The Joyride 2-in-1 Dog Leash & Seatbelt Combo is made from heavy-duty nylon and built to be durable for both walks and car travel. You can relax on your daily walks knowing this adjustable dog harness with side rings stops pulling without adding so much pressure on your dog's throat. Learn more here: https://joyrideharness.attn.tv/aEL1-nOiAFmk .
I do understand that it's durable material nylon. But the part you open and close at the collar it feels to easy to opend. That's worried me and that's the question. Thank you

Joyride Dogs: I totally understand your worry; it may seem easy to open, but it won't open easily, where your dog could wiggle out. You see, dogs are able to escape harnesses due to lack of adjustability for the perfect fit. Even a slight discrepancy in how the harness fits may allow your furbaby to find a way to get out of it. We recommend a slightly snug fit (but not too tight) and your dog won't be able to back out or escape from it! 

Let me know if you need help with anything else!

conversation.message_text:
The Art of Shaving: Up to 30% Off for our Valentine's Sale!
10% off $50
20% off $100
30% off $150. 
No code required
aos.attn.tv/aVMw9mez4iS_
The Art of Shaving: Check out our sale items and take an additional 20% off with code TAKE20. https://aos.attn.tv/aiB5pQcgllMT

The Art of Shaving: Don't forget to take 20% off shaving essentials using TAKE20, while supplies last. Shop now: https://aos.attn.tv/aCx_ILYZG_gg 

Text back if you have any questions!
Where's the soap? The body soap in sandalwood, the 7oz bar.

The Art of Shaving: Thanks for reaching out! Upon checking our site, it appears that the 7 oz. bar is currently unavailable. We do have it in 3 0z,, you can check it out here:

https://aos.attn.tv/aTV4SZI7IGUu/

Let me know how that goes.
Will you be bringing back the 7 ounce bar? I believe it's Proctor and gamble that makes that product isn't it?

The Art of Shaving: I'm sorry about that. I'm afraid we don't carry that item at the moment and unfortunately, it doesn't show me any info on it but I'll definitely pass this along to the team to consider again in the future, thank you for the feedback! If you have any more questions, feel free to let me know. For now, what do you think about the 3 OZ one I shared above?

I have seen that several times as being available in your advertising and on the website and I was using my sandalwood body soap at times as a shaving soap. It works good, but I really do enjoy the larger bar rather than a little 3 ounce one.

The Art of Shaving: I understand how the larger bar is more advantageous; however, at the moment, unfortunately, we do not have this item available in stock. We are working to restock it as soon as possible, but we do not yet have a confirmed estimated date. As soon as the product becomes available again, it will be announced on our website and official channels. If you wish, you may follow our updates so you do not miss the release. I remain at your disposal for any other questions or to assist you with anything you may need.

escalate: ESC expired codes/discount code issues, ask for cart ID and add it in esc notes
Don't send to CS for this client, ESC if needed
For retroactive discount requests add discount % in ESC note
ESC if a customer requests a different resolution, after their escalation was resolved
dos_and_donts: Fun Bucks AREN'T rewards points, those are given during exchanges
promo_and_exclusions: This brand does not use coupon codes or promotions. All of their discounts are exclusively link-based and are applied automatically to the shopping cart upon checkout when the appropriate conditions are met
Please do not advise customers to use promotional codes, do not provide them with any codes, and do not direct them to look on the website for additional codes
They do not have any promotional code text fields on site to facilitate use
